home.seoDescription: tafa3olcard admin and client platform for selling digital products, services, codes, and subscriptions.
home.subtitle: Manage products, services, APIs, clients, payments, warehouse stock, and pricing from one platform.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to ship your next big idea?
home.ctaDescription: Use tafa3olcard to manage scalable product and service sales operations.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Robust RBAC, JWT authentication with secure cookies, and comprehensive audit logging built-in.

realtime.title: Real-time Updates
realtime.description: Seamless Socket.IO integration for instant notifications, presence tracking, and data syncing.

global.title: Global Ready
global.description: Full i18n support with runtime language uploads and dynamic translation bundles.

shopAuth.description: Gift cards, gaming credits, social services, verification numbers, and top-ups paid from one balance.
shopAuth.instantDescription: Track every order and refund failed deliveries automatically.

runtime.resetLinkSentDescription: If that email exists in our system, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
runtime.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
runtime.verifyEmailSuccessDescription: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please click the link to verify your account.
runtime.resetPasswordDescription: Please enter your new password below.
runtime.verifyingEmailDescription: Please wait while we confirm your account.
runtime.emailVerifiedDescription: Your email address has been successfully verified. You can now access all features.
runtime.verificationFailedDescription: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
runtime.missingTokenDescription: No verification token was found in the URL.
runtime.aboutMission: tafa3olcard helps teams manage digital product and service sales with secure workflows, pricing controls, and operational visibility.
runtime.openSourceDescription: tafa3olcard is built as a production platform for product, service, and code sales operations.
runtime.cuttingEdgeDescription: We track the latest developments in the React ecosystem to ensure you're always working with the best tools available.
runtime.coreTeamDescription: tafa3olcard is focused on practical tools for managing clients, stock, APIs, payments, and pricing in one admin system.
runtime.builtWithPassion: Built with passion and a lot of caffeine across 4 continents.
runtime.contactDescription: Whether you have a question about features, pricing, or anything else, our team is ready to answer.
runtime.messageSentDescription: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
runtime.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved to another quadrant of the galaxy.
runtime.dashboardSubtitle: Manage your profile, notifications, sessions, and account security from one place.
runtime.noNotificationsYet: You don't have any notifications yet.
runtime.deviceManagementDescription: This is a list of devices that have recently logged into your account. You can revoke any session that you don't recognize.
runtime.noSessionsDescription: We couldn't retrieve your active sessions. Please try again.
runtime.revokeSessionDescription: Are you sure you want to log out this device? The user will be immediately disconnected from the application.
runtime.dangerZoneDescription: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
runtime.deleteUploadDescription: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this file? This action is irreversible and the file will be removed from cloud storage.
runtime.deleteUserDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone. All their data will be permanently removed.
runtime.auditHistoryPlaceholder: Audit history for this user will appear here.
runtime.deleteRoleDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this role? This will affect all users currently assigned to it.
runtime.languagesInstructions: Download the model JSON, translate every key, then upload the completed language file.
runtime.languageIsoHint: Use ISO code, for example es, de, pt-br.
runtime.forbiddenDescription: You don't have the necessary permissions to view this secure area. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact your administrator.
runtime.serverErrorDescription: Our servers are having a bit of a moment. We've been notified and are working on fixing the issue as fast as we can.
runtime.settingsDescription: Manage your account settings and preferences
runtime.deleteAccountWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently removed.
runtime.dataLoadErrorDescription: An error occurred while loading this data. Please try again.
runtime.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Max size is {{size}}
runtime.systemPermissionsDescription: Reference for all available access control points
runtime.storageManagementDescription: Manage user uploads and system storage

shopProfile.levelsDescription: Your points by service and the next reward level available to you.
shopProfile.noLevelsDescription: Levels appear after services and service groups are assigned to your account.
shopProfile.sessionsDescription: Review devices currently signed into your account.

settings.title: Settings
settings.twoFactorDescription: Protect your account with Google Authenticator or any compatible authenticator app.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.clientAccountCreatedMessage: Your client account has been created by an administrator.
notifications.clientBalanceUpdatedMessage: An administrator updated your account balance.
notifications.loginDetectedMessage: A new login was detected on your account.
notifications.accountLockedMessage: Your account has been locked due to multiple failed login attempts.
notifications.twoFactorEnabledMessage: Two-factor authentication was enabled on your account.
notifications.twoFactorDisabledMessage: Two-factor authentication was disabled on your account.
notifications.apiProductUnavailableMessage: An imported API product is no longer available from the provider.
notifications.paymentRequestApprovedMessage: Your bank payment was approved and your balance was updated.
notifications.paymentRequestRejectedMessage: Your bank payment was rejected. Review the admin comment and submit again if needed.
notifications.problemReportCreatedMessage: A client created a new problem report.
notifications.problemReportClientReplyTitle: Client replied to a problem report
notifications.problemReportClientReplyMessage: A client added a new message to a problem report.
notifications.problemReportAdminReplyMessage: An administrator replied to your problem report.
notifications.problemReportStatusUpdatedMessage: The status of your problem report was updated.

payments.manageDescription: Review bank payment requests and approve or reject balance credit.
payments.historyDescription: Top-ups, bank requests, refunds, and code redemptions
payments.amountHint: USD-denominated. Bank methods show the payable amount.
payments.noBanks: No bank payment method is available.
payments.bankPaymentDescription: Send a bank transfer and upload proof for admin approval.
payments.paymentCodeDescription: Redeem a secure platform payment code.
payments.securityNote: Bank payments are reviewed by the admin before the balance is credited.

shopHeader.searchDescription: Find products, services, order numbers, or codes from one place.

shopSmm.empty: No social media products found for these filters.
shopSmm.pickProductDescription: The buy panel adapts to the selected social media product.
shopSmm.linkHint: Public profile, post, video, or page URL

shopNumbers.description: Real numbers by service and country. Receive verification SMS using products from your stock catalog.

paymentGateways.description: Create and manage electronic gateways and bank payment methods.

paymentCodes.title: Payment codes
paymentCodes.description: Generate secure balance recharge codes and monitor all redeem attempts.
paymentCodes.journalEmpty: No payment code journal entries found

simulation.title: Pricing simulation
simulation.description: Test product final price calculation with client balance, levels, special prices, and promotions.

apiSimulation.title: API simulation
apiSimulation.description: Test supported provider API groups from one screen.

temporaryNumberCodingSitesSimulation.selectApi: Select Temporary Number Coding Sites API
temporaryNumberCodingSitesSimulation.numberWarning: Get number can reserve a real temporary number and may charge the provider account. Cancel test activations when you finish.

actionDescriptions.GET_BALANCE: Checks the provider account balance using the saved API key.
actionDescriptions.GET_NUMBER: Requests a temporary phone number for a service and optional country or price filters.
actionDescriptions.GET_NUMBER_V2: Requests a temporary phone number with the provider's JSON response variant.
actionDescriptions.SET_STATUS: Changes activation state, for example ready, request another SMS, finish, or cancel.
actionDescriptions.GET_STATUS: Checks whether the SMS code arrived for one activation.
actionDescriptions.GET_STATUS_V2: Checks one activation status using the provider's JSON response variant.
actionDescriptions.GET_PRICES: Loads available prices and counts by service and country.
actionDescriptions.GET_PRICES_V2: Loads provider price data using the second prices format.
actionDescriptions.GET_PRICES_V3: Loads provider price data using the third prices format.
actionDescriptions.GET_ACTIVE_ACTIVATIONS: Lists active activations currently held by the provider account.

socialMediaServiceProvidersSimulation.selectApi: Select Social Media Service Providers API
socialMediaServiceProvidersSimulation.orderWarning: Add order can create a real provider order. Use a safe test service or known test payload.

actionDescriptions.SERVICES: Loads all available SMM services with category, type, rate, min/max quantity, refill, and cancel support.
actionDescriptions.ADD_ORDER: Creates a provider order. The payload can include service, link, quantity, and extra fields such as comments, usernames, keywords, runs, interval, or traffic options.
actionDescriptions.ORDER_STATUS: Checks one order by order ID and returns charge, status, start count, remains, and currency.
actionDescriptions.MULTIPLE_ORDER_STATUS: Checks up to 100 order IDs at once using a comma-separated orders request.
actionDescriptions.CREATE_REFILL: Creates a refill request for one order that supports refill.
actionDescriptions.MULTIPLE_REFILL: Creates refill requests for up to 100 orders at once.
actionDescriptions.MULTIPLE_REFILL_STATUS: Checks multiple refill request statuses at once.
actionDescriptions.CREATE_CANCEL: Creates cancellation requests for one or more orders that support cancel.
actionDescriptions.BALANCE: Checks the provider account balance and currency.

giftCardProvidersSimulation.title: Gift card providers simulation
giftCardProvidersSimulation.description: Test APIs that use the Gift Card Providers protocol.
giftCardProvidersSimulation.orderWarning: Create order sends a real provider request and may charge the provider account. Use a test product or a known safe order.

actionDescriptions.PROFILE: Checks the provider account profile and available balance using the saved API token.
actionDescriptions.PRODUCTS: Loads the provider product catalog. After loading, product type and quantity filters work locally without another request.
actionDescriptions.CONTENT: Loads categories and products under a provider category or parent ID.
actionDescriptions.CREATE_ORDER: Creates a real order with product ID, quantity, optional UUID, and provider-specific parameters.
actionDescriptions.CHECK_ORDERS: Checks one or more provider orders by order ID or UUID.

giftCardProviders2Simulation.title: Gift card providers2 simulation
giftCardProviders2Simulation.description: Test APIs that use the ZNET-style Gift Card Providers2 protocol.
giftCardProviders2Simulation.transactionWarning: This action can create a real provider transaction. Use a safe test account or known test payload.

actionDescriptions.BALANCE: Checks dealer balance using kod and sifre credentials.
actionDescriptions.INSTITUTIONS: Loads bill institutions, query codes, provider names, costs, and special account notes.
actionDescriptions.SUBMIT_BILL: Submits a bill payment using institution, bill, subscriber, amount, and unique transaction fields.
actionDescriptions.CHECK_BILL: Checks the status of one submitted bill transaction.
actionDescriptions.BULK_CHECK_BILL: Checks up to 100 bill transactions at once. Pending transactions may be omitted by the provider.
actionDescriptions.AIRTIME_TOPUP: Submits an airtime or credit top-up for a phone number, operator, type, amount, and unique transaction ID.
actionDescriptions.CHECK_AIRTIME: Checks the status of an airtime or credit top-up transaction.
actionDescriptions.PIN_PRODUCTS: Loads the provider game PIN product list with game, denomination, price, and player info fields.
actionDescriptions.SUBMIT_PIN: Submits a game PIN purchase or load request using game, denomination, reference, customer phone, and player info.
actionDescriptions.CHECK_PIN: Checks whether a submitted game PIN transaction is pending, approved with PIN, or cancelled.

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Update the application name, logo, and favicon.
branding.keepCurrentLogo: Current logo will be kept unless you upload a new one.
branding.keepCurrentFavicon: Current favicon will be kept unless you upload a new one.

orders.title: Orders
orders.switchApiSuccess: Order resent through the selected API
orders.switchApiDescription: Use this when the provider failed. Choose another saved API product, map the old client inputs to the new requirements, then resend the same order.

issueReasons.API_PROVIDER_RETURNED_ERROR: The provider returned an error. Review the provider response before confirming the order.
issueReasons.API_REQUEST_FAILED: The provider request failed. Review the provider settings and try again.
issueReasons.API_STATUS_CHECK_FAILED: The provider status check failed. Review the provider settings and try again.
issueReasons.ORDER_STATUS_CHECK_MAX_ATTEMPTS_REACHED: The provider did not complete the order after the maximum number of status checks.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_REQUEST_FAILED: The Gift Card Providers request failed. Check the API URL, token, and provider availability.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_2_REQUEST_FAILED: The Gift Card Providers 2 request failed. Check the API URL, credentials, and provider availability.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_2_CANCELLED: The Gift Card Providers 2 provider cancelled this order.
issueReasons.SOCIAL_MEDIA_PROVIDER_REQUEST_FAILED: The Social Media provider request failed. Check the API URL, token, and provider availability.
issueReasons.SOCIAL_MEDIA_PROVIDER_ORDER_FAILED: The Social Media provider marked this order as failed.
issueReasons.TEMPORARY_NUMBER_PROVIDER_REQUEST_FAILED: The number provider request failed. Check the API URL, token, and provider availability.
issueReasons.TEMPORARY_NUMBER_STATUS_CANCELLED: The number provider cancelled this activation.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE: The provider account has insufficient balance.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_QUANTITY_NOT_AVAILABL: The requested quantity is not available from the provider.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_QUANTITY_NOT_ALLOWED: The requested quantity is not allowed by the provider.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_PLAYER_ID_BLOCKED: The provider blocked this player ID.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_TWO_FACTOR_REQUIRED: The provider requires 2FA for this order.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_PRODUCT_DELETED_OR_NO: The provider product was deleted or was not found.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_PRODUCT_NOT_AVAILABLE: The provider product is not available now.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_TRY_AGAIN_AFTER_ONE_M: The provider asked to retry after one minute.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_QUANTITY_TOO_SMALL: The requested quantity is too small for the provider.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_QUANTITY_TOO_LARGE: The requested quantity is too large for the provider.
issueReasons.GIFT_CARD_PROVIDER_UNKNOWN_ERROR: The provider returned an unknown error.

problemReports.title: Problem reports
problemReports.subtitle: Report order, payment, product, wallet, or account issues and follow every reply.
problemReports.subject: Subject
problemReports.adminSubtitle: Manage client issues, assign ownership, and keep the conversation auditable.
problemReports.searchPlaceholder: Search by number, subject, or description

typeDescriptions.ORDER: Problem with an existing order, delivery, code, or provider status.
typeDescriptions.PAYMENT: Bank transfer, payment proof, pending approval, or rejected payment.
typeDescriptions.WALLET: Balance, open credit, payment code, or financial movement issue.
typeDescriptions.PRODUCT: Wrong product data, price, country, requirements, or availability.
typeDescriptions.API_PROVIDER: Provider issue, failed request, delayed status check, or API product mismatch.
typeDescriptions.WAREHOUSE: Delivered stock item, card code, subscription code, or manual warehouse issue.
typeDescriptions.ACCOUNT_SECURITY: Login, 2FA, sessions, profile, or suspicious activity.
typeDescriptions.REFUND: Refund request connected to an order or payment.
typeDescriptions.GENERAL: Anything else that does not fit another type.

problemReports.detailsHint: Add the details for this problem type. They will be stored with the report so support can act faster.
